data.name: Confessions at Candlewood Lake
data.detailed_description:
關注焦點


關於此遊戲

“Confessions at Candlewood Lake” is a romantic tale of four women who take a surprise long weekend at a luxurious chalet in Candlewood Lake, Connecticut, after all their flights are cancelled on account of a volcanic eruption in Iceland. Watch as connections are created, and budding romances begin with the backdrop of a gorgeous lake behind them.

Featuring:

- A heart-warming tale mixed with witty dialogue
- Acoustic folk and smooth jazz soundtrack
- Beautiful Anime style art
- Multiple endings and romantic arcs
- 50k+ Word count

data.short_description: “Confessions at Candlewood Lake” is a romantic comedy Visual Novel tale of four women who take a surprise long weekend at a luxurious chalet in Candlewood Lake, Connecticut.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® Vista / 7 / 8/ 8.1/ 10
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 - 10.13
  • 處理器: 1.5GHz Intel Core 2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
